Title: Grants family leave benefits to persons who perform artistic and cultural work
Summary: Grants family leave benefits to persons who perform artistic and cultural work, including but not limited to, artistic and performing personnel, creative and design personnel, technical and production personnel, and front-of-house support personnel engaged in the production or operation of live theatrical or artistic performances.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the workers' compensation law, in relation to family leave for persons who perform artistic and culture work
